comparison_with_flashinfer.decode_tpot_delta_pct_at_250k: triton ~2.6% slower TPOT at 250K (33.2 vs 32.3 ms)
comparison_with_flashinfer.ttft_delta_pct_at_250k: triton ~84% slower TTFT at 250K (3863 vs 2096 ms)
comparison_with_flashinfer.verdict: Both backends flat 30-32 tok/s decode across 1K-250K. Flashinfer wins long-context TTFT decisively. Triton is the safe-default backend for head_dim=256 / FP8 KV edge cases (Gemma 4) but for qwen36 TP=2 / 256K serve flashinfer remains the right choice.

note: Long-context decode regression that historically dropped 33 tok/s @ short to 2.6 tok/s @ 250K is closed on v0.5.11 for both backends. tok_per_sec = 1000 / tpot_ms.
